items.title: Comprehensive accessibility audit
items.description: Run full VoiceOver audit on all screens. Audit agents found some missing accessibilityHints and inconsistent accessibilityLabel patterns. Focus on: workout flow, enrollment sheets, session summary.

items.title: Remaining CancellationError coverage
items.description: Several services still lack CancellationError handling: SchedulingService, ArmCareAssessmentService, StreakViewModel, PrescriptionService. These log noise in console but don't break UX.

items.title: Sport-neutral strings audit
items.description: WhyThisExerciseCard was neutralized but the ExerciseExplanation model still has baseballBenefit field name. Consider renaming to performanceBenefit at the model + DB column level for consistency.

items.title: Additional decoder paths to flexibleDecoder
items.description: Audit found iso8601 decoders in less-critical paths (HealthKit sync, check-in history). These are lower risk but should be unified for consistency.

items.title: Empty state illustrations
items.description: Current empty states use SF Symbols. Consider custom illustrations or Lottie animations for key empty states (no programs, no workouts, first launch) to improve perceived polish.

items.title: Loading skeleton screens
items.description: Replace spinner-based loading with skeleton/shimmer placeholders for program cards and workout lists. Better perceived performance.

items.title: Haptic feedback on key actions
items.description: Add haptic feedback on: enrollment success, workout complete, streak milestone. Small UX polish for physical device.
